field.tiptext: This is used for versioning to override a property in a version and to mark it as virtual deleted
field.developercomments: This is used for versioning to override a property in a version and to mark it as virtual deleted
field.name: deleteind
field.helptext: This is used for versioning to override a property in a version and to mark it as virtual deleted

field.tiptext: Perform the operation on the current context
field.displayname: Perform the operation on the current context
field.developercomments: Perform the operation on the current context
field.name: form
field.helptext: Perform the operation on the current context

field.tiptext: Perform the operation at session level
field.displayname: Perform the operation at session level
field.developercomments: Perform the operation at session level
field.name: session
field.helptext: Perform the operation at session level

field.name: referpage
field.helptext: Select a page where this block should refer to.

field.tiptext: Remove from the current context or session
field.displayname: Remove from the current context or session
field.developercomments: Remove from the current context or session
field.name: remove
field.helptext: Remove from the current context or session

field.tiptext: A property marked as Resolve will be resolved when ever this table shows up in a join.
field.developercomments: A property marked as Resolve will be resolved when ever this table shows up in a join.
field.name: resolve
field.helptext: A property marked as Resolve will be resolved when ever this table shows up in a join.

field.tiptext: This determines if the field will be retrieved and displayed on the list page as part of the list.
field.developercomments: This determines if the field will be retrieved and displayed on the list page as part of the list.
field.name: listdisplay
field.helptext: This determines if the field will be retrieved and displayed on the list page as part of the list.

field.tiptext: The name of the field on the meta view for which the Field Link has been attached manually.
field.developercomments: The name of the field on the meta view for which the Field Link has been attached manually.
field.name: linkfield
field.helptext: The name of the field on the meta view for which the Field Link has been attached manually.

field.name: message
field.helptext: This error message will be displayed if the attached validation rule fails.

field.displayname: Generate form level save and continue link?
field.name: formlevelsave

field.tiptext: Populate the field with this name
field.displayname: Populate the field with this name
field.developercomments: Populate the field with this name
field.name: populatename
field.helptext: Populate the field with this name

field.displayname: Left value for the validate condition
field.name: lvalue
referblockid
field.helptext: Select the block where this viewdef should refer to.

field.name: routepage
field.helptext: Select page where you want to redirect to.

field.displayname: Right value for the validate condition
field.name: rvalue

field.tiptext: A property marked as Resolve will be resolved when ever this table shows up in a join.
field.developercomments: A property marked as Resolve will be resolved when ever this table shows up in a join.
field.name: resolvedisplay
field.helptext: A property marked as Resolve will be resolved when ever this table shows up in a join.

property.tiptext: Enter the Name of the MetaObject. This will be used as the Table name. Keep into consideration the database naming conventions.
property.developercomments: Enter the Name of the MetaObject. This will be used as the Table name. Keep into consideration the database naming conventions.
property.helptext: Enter the Name of the MetaObject. This will be used as the Table name. Keep into consideration the database naming conventions.

property.tiptext: Briefly describe the metaobject here, can provide what basic functionality is assigned to this metaobject.
property.developercomments: Briefly describe the metaobject here, can provide what basic functionality is assigned to this metaobject.
property.helptext: Briefly describe the metaobject here, can provide what basic functionality is assigned to this metaobject.

property.tiptext: Identifies if the metaobject is a lookup object and will be presented always. Can be used for DropDowns.
property.developercomments: Identifies if the metaobject is a lookup object and will be presented always. Can be used for DropDowns.
property.helptext: Identifies if the metaobject is a lookup object and will be presented always. Can be used for DropDowns.

property.tiptext: This identifies if this metaobject is persistent into the database/ filesystem.
property.developercomments: This identifies if this metaobject is persistent into the database/ filesystem. A No means no Database call to be made. Could refer to a web service.
property.helptext: This identifies if this metaobject is persistent into the database/ filesystem. A No means no Database call to be made. Could refer to a web service.
Source for lookup either xml or sql

property.tiptext: Name of the Metaobject on which this meta object is dependent.
property.developercomments: Name of the Metaobject on which this meta object is dependent. This would be similar to the FK relationship on the Database
property.helptext: Name of the Metaobject on which this meta object is dependent. This would be similar to the FK relationship on the Database

property.tiptext: Determines if this is an identifying relationship.
property.developercomments: Determines if this is an identifying relationship. Similar to the identifying and non identifying relationships on the databases.
property.helptext: Determines if this is an identifying relationship. Similar to the identifying and non identifying relationships on the databases.

property.tiptext: This determines if the work flow will allow navigattion based on this dependency.
property.developercomments: This determines if the work flow will allow navigattion based on this dependency.
property.helptext: This determines if the work flow will allow navigattion based on this dependency.

property.developercomments: Meta Object name that this Object references
property.helptext: Meta Object name that this Object references
Below are the available default system variables - SYSDATE: stores current date on insert SYSDATETIME: stores current timestamp on insert

property.tiptext: This determines if the field will be retrieved and displayed on the list page as part of the list.
property.developercomments: This determines if the field will be retrieved and displayed on the list page as part of the list.
property.helptext: This determines if the field will be retrieved and displayed on the list page as part of the list.

property.tiptext: A property marked as Resolve will be resolved when ever this table shows up in a join.
property.developercomments: A property marked as Resolve will be resolved when ever this table shows up in a join.
property.helptext: A property marked as Resolve will be resolved when ever this table shows up in a join.

property.tiptext: This is used for versioning to override a property in a version and to mark it as virtual deleted
property.developercomments: This is used for versioning to override a property in a version and to mark it as virtual deleted
property.helptext: This is used for versioning to override a property in a version and to mark it as virtual deleted
Parent property must exist under the same metaobject. Eventually this text box will turn into a dropdown which has all the properties for the metaobject you are working on.
Select an operator. At runtime, parent property value will be evaluated using this operator and a decision is made while showing the child question.
Specify value of the parent property which will be used during the evaluation process.
